ogTitle: Bellenden Ker vs Bellevue: Climate Safety

heading: Bellenden Ker vs Bellevue — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bellenden Ker, Queensland and Bellevue, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bellevue has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bellenden Ker (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bellenden Ker or Bellevue safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bellenden Ker has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Bellevue scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bellenden Ker scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Bellevue scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bellenden Ker or Bellevue?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bellevue has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
